description: Feishu chat conversation about GitHub token configuration, user asking about .env file location and bot replying about missing GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.
Feishu knowledge base permission dialog for adding editable members, showing user list with miao, 缪东旭, and 吴湘萍 with admin privileges.
Event poster for 'Lobster Shell Shedding Plan' tech conference on March 15 at Tsinghua Science Park, featuring AI Agent speakers and multiple sponsor logos.
Feishu chat showing bot WLB requesting contact:contact.base:readonly permission with authorization link to Feishu Open Platform developer console.
Duplicate event poster for 'Lobster Shell Shedding Plan' tech conference on March 15 at Tsinghua Science Park with speaker lineup and sponsors.
Dark mode chat interface showing emoji reactions (eyes, hourglass, checkmark, smiley) with counts, discussing timer functionality every 10 seconds.
Project settings dashboard showing current usage ($1.11) and estimated usage ($10.92) with memory, CPU, network, volume metrics and RAM/Volume graphs.
Discord mobile app showing Slack configuration code with channels.slack and plugins.entries.slack settings, botToken, appToken, and groupPolicy options.
Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index charts comparing AI models by performance scores, with bar graphs showing proprietary vs open weights and reasoning indicators.
Slack conversation showing a 3-tier collaboration architecture with L1 real-time, L2 thread, and L3 file levels using Slack and GitHub, plus thread workflow instructions.
